title: BuildUnit
description: Request body for POST /players/me/units/{unitId}/build. Starts construction of a target unit type at the chosen planet hex.

planetId.description: Planet where the builder unit currently operates.

targetTypeId.description: Catalog id of the unit type to build.

targetHex.description: Axial coordinates where the new unit will be placed.

targetPosition.description: Optional normalized position within the target hex (defaults to center).
